case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. DAVID JESSE PINA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2017 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2017 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED SEP-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINA, DAVID JESSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/07/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PINA, DAVID JESSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINA, DAVID JESSE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PINA, DAVID JESSE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
